_doc: Re-run dark+ens validation with EXPLICIT env vars (BEST_ID_DARK_CLAHE/GAMMA), not the BEST_ID_DARK_PROFILE shortcut. The previous lovetest_fn_finalists sweep happened to be running with a stale pyc cache that didn't include _v9_profile_enabled(), so the profile shortcut was a silent no-op. Explicit env vars exercise the same code paths that the dark_recovery_finalists winner used (validated +0.0501 IDF1 on darkTest).

variants.name: dark_v9
variants.notes: explicit CLAHE + auto gamma (= v9 profile)

variants.name: dark_v9_plus_ens_896_softnms
variants.notes: STACKED + Soft-NMS sigma=0.5 to preserve high-overlap dancers
